examples: We all need to look for ways to reduce our carbon footprint.
The water-cooling scheme will reduce the system's carbon footprint by up to 85 percent.
After all, even if profit is the motive, the net result is a reduction in the hotel's "carbon footprint".
Between 1970 and 2008, the ecological footprint of high-income nations rose seven percent, the report said.
Many others, however, are too concerned with day-to-day subsistence to care about their carbon footprint.
